data.body: WS-I + ffc4 (MCP story) DONE + committed. Workflow MCP tools now typed read tools (workflow_run schema + WorkflowRunOut + 25K cap). 7 stories complete (B,C,E,H,I,ffc4 + WS-... ). Remaining: WS-A (runner decompose), WS-J (extras), WS-D (agentic, needs A), WS-F (prompts), WS-G (evals, needs F), WS-K (capstone, needs D+E+H+ffc4).
